subcodes.first_line: The light hath risen from the horizon of manifestation, and Beauty hath shone forth from the dayspring of majesty, whereupon all things cried out in their inmost essence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد طلع النور عن افق الظهور و اشرق الجمال عن مشرق الجلال اذا نادت الاشیاء فی سر
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
